{"verdict":"approve","summary":"The new `Deck p` definition faithfully formalizes deck transformations as self-homeomorphisms of `E` commuting with `p`, and the closure/action lemmas match that definition. I found no semantic mismatch, vacuity, or hidden prerequisite moved into assumptions.","findings":[]}

verdict_obj.summary: The new `Deck p` definition faithfully formalizes deck transformations as self-homeomorphisms of `E` commuting with `p`, and the closure/action lemmas match that definition. I found no semantic mismatch, vacuity, or hidden prerequisite moved into assumptions.
